summary: Iteration 6 testing: Expanded Search, Batch Printing (Print All Visible), and SR Accessibility announcements. All 12 backend tests pass. All 17 frontend feature requirements verified. All three new features fully working.

issues: Print All (N) button at far-right x≈1566 can be visually obscured by top-right Sonner toast notifications (e.g. 'Welcome back, admin!'). Not a functional bug - button is clickable (z-index correct) but visually may appear behind toast in screenshots.

features_verified.search_placeholder_includes_manufacturer: ✅ placeholder='Search by Serial No., Recipient, Manufacturer, or Model...'
features_verified.search_by_manufacturer_dell: ✅ Searching 'Dell' returns UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (manufacturer=Dell), SR shows 'Search complete, 1 result found for "Dell".'
features_verified.search_by_model_latitude: ✅ Searching 'Latitude' returns UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (modal=Latitude 5490), SR shows 'Search complete, 1 result found for "Latitude".'
features_verified.sr_announcement_no_search: ✅ SR text = '2 records shown.' when no search active
features_verified.sr_announcement_with_search: ✅ SR text = 'Search complete, N result(s) found for "term".' when search active
features_verified.print_all_button_count_with_search: ✅ Shows 'Print All (1)' when search returns 1 result
features_verified.print_all_zero_records_toast: ✅ Error toast 'No records to print. Adjust your filters first.' shown when filtered.length=0
features_verified.print_all_zero_records_no_navigation: ✅ Does NOT navigate to /print-all when 0 records
features_verified.print_all_navigates_to_print_all_route: ✅ Navigates to /print-all with filtered records in location.state
features_verified.print_all_page_back_button: ✅ data-testid='print-all-back-button' with text 'Back to Dashboard' found
features_verified.print_all_page_record_count: ✅ '2 records ready to print' span shown
features_verified.c4k_batch_break_class: ✅ First record has class 'c4k-batch-break', last record has no class - correct N-1 breaks
features_verified.direct_navigate_print_all_no_state: ✅ Navigating to /print-all without state redirects to / (dashboard)
features_verified.back_button_navigates_to_dashboard: ✅ Back to Dashboard button returns to / URL
features_verified.auto_print_on_mount: ✅ Auto-print dialog triggered (confirmed via dialog handler interception within 600ms)

seed_data_creation: Updated UI-FORM-SAVE-001 with manufacturer='Dell', modal='Latitude 5490'. Created TEST-BATCH-001 with manufacturer='HP', modal='EliteBook 840' for batch print testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Error toast message is 'No records to print. Adjust your filters first.' but requirement spec says 'No records to print' - extra clarifying text is helpful but slight spec deviation.

The data field is named 'modal' (not 'model') throughout the codebase (per original form naming). Dashboard table shows 'MODEL' column header which is correct for end-users, but the field internally is 'modal'. This is by design and consistent throughout.
PrintAllPage auto-triggers window.print() after 600ms on mount - tested via dialog interception. Behavior is correct per spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 all features verified: (1) Expanded search: filters on manufacturer + modal fields, SR announcements working with correct aria attributes. (2) Print All button: shows count, error toast for 0 records, navigates to /print-all. (3) PrintAllPage: renders correctly with batch-record-{serial} data-testids, c4k-batch-break on all but last, back button works, direct-navigate-without-state redirects to /. Test records: UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (Dell/Latitude 5490), TEST-BATCH-001 (HP/EliteBook 840). Admin: admin/Admin@12345.
